---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Have an idea to make Tech Passport better? We want to hear it!
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, community-idea
assignees: ausjones84
---

## What problem does this solve?
Tell us what's missing or what could be better. The more context the better.

## Describe your idea
A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Who would benefit?
- [ ] New engineers breaking into cloud
- [ ] Career switchers
- [ ] DevOps / SRE engineers
- [ ] International engineers
- [ ] Everyone

## How should it work?
Describe how the feature would work in the app. Mockups, sketches, or screenshots are welcome!

## Priority (in your view)
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] This is blocking me from using the app fully

## Additional Context
Any other context, links, or references about the feature request here.

---
> Your ideas shape Tech Passport's future. Thank you for taking the time to share! 🚀
